description: Adalimumab biosimilar (Hadlima) — retrospective evidence chain for FDA approval

claims.claim_text: Hadlima demonstrates analytical similarity to Humira across all critical quality attributes including structure, function, and purity
Comparative PK study demonstrated bioequivalence in healthy volunteers with 90% CI within 80-125% for AUC and Cmax
Clinical efficacy study in moderate-to-severe RA patients showed equivalent ACR20 response rate within pre-specified equivalence margin
Comparative immunogenicity assessment showed similar anti-drug antibody incidence rates between Hadlima and Humira
Manufacturing process validated with 3 consecutive PPQ batches demonstrating consistent quality attributes within specifications
Stability program conducted per ICH Q1A and Q5C with 24-month real-time data supporting proposed shelf life of 36 months
Functional equivalence demonstrated via TNF-alpha neutralization assay and ADCC reporter assay
Viral clearance studies demonstrate adequate safety margin with >4 log reduction across 4 orthogonal steps
